sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15711" key="a)rtifanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρτι-φᾰνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n15711.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">just seen, having newly appeared,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:12:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.5</biblScope></bibl>,al.</sense> </entryFree>
